title: DARK PLACE BRIGHT
description:
OPTIFINE IS REQUIED.  This resource pack changes light levels so that your Minecraft player can always see clearly, even in the end and nether!
Most servers will allow DARK PLACE BRIGHT as it really doesn't give much of a advantage.
DARK PLACE BRIGHT
body:
OPTIFINE IS REQUIRED

This resource pack changes light levels so that your Minecraft player can always see clearly, even in the end and nether!
Most servers will allow DARK PLACE BRIGHT as it really doesn't give much of a advantage.
DARK PLACE BRIGHT resource pack is used by over 200,000 Minecrafters worldwide.
